era: Pre-Elysium, late Identity Abyss / early Existential Collapse pressure band

source_refs.relevance: Grounds Lucent as attention sovereignty, performance pressure, Buzz/Clout economy, and narrative capture.
Grounds Lucent perception engineers who make events socially persuasive.
Grounds managed reality, counter-memetic culture, and attention as governance.
Grounds Lucent Venusian spectacle space and Lagrange broadcast infrastructure.
Grounds FullSense, EmotionCast, attention capture, and neural media manipulation.
Grounds broadcast infrastructure as geopolitical terrain.
Defines the specific two-end tethered counterweight station layout for this seed.

scene_premise: A hostage negotiation unfolds live inside a Lucent tether station where the hostage-taker, hostage, negotiator, newsroom, and nuisance influencers are all wired into competing media feeds covering the event in real time.

constraints: The comedy comes from Lucent turning danger into format, not from making the hostage stakes fake.
Use absurd professionalism, brand panic, clout opportunism, and feed etiquette as pressure valves.
Do not collapse into procedural severity or Pallas-style industrial realism.

station_geometry.description: A spinning tethered counterweight station whose practical silhouette reads as a giant observing eye gazing down the tether at a bustling city sealed inside a clear metropolis bubble.
station_geometry.metropolis_dome: The larger, brighter city-bubble counterweight: residential, consumer, nightlife, audience-participation, and brand labor districts under a transparent pressure shell. From the media end it reads as a bustling terrarium of visible lives: plazas, platform housing, transit threads, emergency shutters, and camera-aware civic interiors.
station_geometry.media_headquarters_dome: The smaller, denser counterweight mass: a giant eyeball-like media headquarters whose lens-faced broadcast aperture, iris shutters, sensor rings, and gold-white newsroom stacks point down the tether toward the city dome. It houses Lucent newsroom command, Reality Architect suites, feed arbitration rooms, crisis-format studios, advertising markets, and executive visibility courts.
station_geometry.elevator_tether: A pressurized elevator spine/transfer cable running like an optic nerve between the staring media eye and the city bubble. During the hostage event it becomes a literal and narrative choke point: whoever controls elevator permissions controls which bodies, drones, medics, negotiators, cameras, and signal relays can cross.
station_geometry.gravity_and_sightlines: Each end experiences spin gravity locally; the elevator ride crosses changing apparent gravity and strong viewlines between the eye and the bubble. The media headquarters has privileged long-range optical and feed sightlines onto the city dome, while the city experiences the eye as a visible civic fact overhead: architecture as audience.
station_geometry.engineering_assumption_status: Scene-local staging canon from user request; needs AetheriaLore backfill if promoted beyond this pilot.

live_media_conditions: The negotiator, hostage-taker, and hostage each have direct feed access, but their feeds are mediated by platform latency, moderation overlays, sponsor-risk throttles, and audience reaction metrics.
Lucent crisis coverage is not a neutral observer. It can alter incentives by surfacing sympathy, ridicule, villain framing, redemption arcs, and branded intervention prompts in real time.
Influencers patched into the scene can distract, provoke, accidentally help, or create reputational exits that official negotiators cannot offer.
Audience sentiment is a resource and a hazard: it can reduce security pressure by making a violent breach unmarketable, or it can reward escalation if the wrong narrative catches.

participants.role: Lucent crisis negotiator / former live-format host
participants.scene_function: Tries to keep everyone alive while speaking in a register the feeds can metabolize without triggering a breach.
Has a hostage and a feed, but wants recognition, debt relief, and proof he still exists more than he wants murder.
Knows enough about feed control to be dangerous, but is physically vulnerable and publicly becoming a character in someone else?s arc.
Frames herself as empathic bridge while trying to convert the negotiation into a redemption collab.
Wants the hostage-taker to say something clip-worthy and keeps trying to make cowardice look like moral clarity.

participants.role: Lucent newsroom, moderators, Reality Architects, sponsor-risk engine
participants.scene_function: Not a person but a pressure field: edits visibility, throttles feeds, feeds prompts, and reprices everyone by the second.

public_state_variables.audience_sympathy: split between rescue, punishment, and spectacle hunger
public_state_variables.security_pressure: waiting for narrative permission to breach
public_state_variables.truth_visibility: low; every fact arrives wearing makeup

open_lore_gaps: The specific Lucent eye-and-city-bubble tethered counterweight station needs a future AetheriaLore article or subsection if reused.
Lucent crisis-negotiation protocol and feed-law boundaries need source canon.
Buzz/Clout conversion into emergency privileges, legal shielding, and audience intervention rights needs economy/legal elaboration.
